F

FEATURE_NAMES - Static variable in class app.service.impl.anomalies.QuantumAnomaliesDetectionService
 
fetchData(String, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Method in interface app.service.DataSourceService
Fetches, validates, and refines historical financial asset transaction pricing benchmarks matching the specified scope configurations.
fetchData(String, String, LocalDateTime, LocalDateTime) - Method in class app.service.impl.datasource.YahooFinanceService
Synchronizes and acquires a historical data record array matching specific asset parameters.
FinancialIndicators - Class in app.dto
A storage container entity grouping calculated strategic technical analysis indicator metrics.
FinancialIndicators() - Constructor for class app.dto.FinancialIndicators
 
FinancialIndicatorsAnomalyDetectionPanel - Class in app.gui.views
Concrete specialization of BaseAnomalyDetectionPanel aimed at configuring and visually inspecting structural anomalies detected on mathematical technical analysis indicators.
FinancialIndicatorsAnomalyDetectionPanel() - Constructor for class app.gui.views.FinancialIndicatorsAnomalyDetectionPanel
 
FinancialIndicatorsPeriods - Class in app.dto
Handles the configuration, validation, and parsing of calculation period windows required by various financial technical indicator calculations.
FinancialIndicatorsPeriods(String, String[], String, String) - Constructor for class app.dto.FinancialIndicatorsPeriods
Constructs a validated instance of FinancialIndicatorsPeriods by parsing input string data parameters.
FinancialValuesPanel - Class in app.gui.views
An interactive graphical panel tasked with configuring time periods and visualizing the trends of main technical analysis indicators (RSI, MACD, ATR, CMF).
FinancialValuesPanel() - Constructor for class app.gui.views.FinancialValuesPanel
Constructs the panel by arranging the top control bar containing fields for financial indicators and hooking the event listener to the calculate button.
FloatingMessage - Class in app.gui.components
A utility class that spawns transient, non-blocking notification windows above the UI.
FloatingMessage(String, JButton, int) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.FloatingMessage
Constructs and displays a transient floating notification window anchored near a specific component button.
FullScreenFrame - Class in app.gui.components
A specialized JFrame that provides built-in support for full-screen mode toggling.
FullScreenFrame(String) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.FullScreenFrame
Constructs a FullScreenFrame with a window title, starts it in a maximized state, and initializes full-screen key bindings.
